usage.title: Create Recipe Steps in 4 Easy Steps

items.title: Upload Your Food Photo

items.title: Configure Settings
items.description: Choose step count (4-8), visual style (casual, professional, minimalist, vibrant, illustrated), and aspect ratio.

items.title: AI Generates Steps
items.description: Our AI analyzes your dish, identifies ingredients and techniques, and creates realistic step-by-step cooking images.

items.title: Download & Share
items.description: Download individual images or batch download all steps. Export in multiple formats optimized for your platform.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have more questions? Contact us at support@recipestepgenerator.com

items.question: What is Recipe Step Generator and how does it work?
items.answer: Recipe Step Generator is an AI-powered tool that transforms food photos into professional step-by-step cooking instruction images. Simply upload a photo of your finished dish, and our AI analyzes the ingredients, cooking techniques, and presentation to generate 4-8 realistic cooking step images automatically.

items.question: How accurate is the AI recipe analysis?
items.answer: Our AI achieves 93-96% accuracy in recognizing cooking techniques, ingredients, and dish composition. It understands 500+ cooking techniques including grilling, sautéing, baking, braising, and more, producing realistic step sequences.

items.question: What output formats and resolutions are supported?
items.answer: We support three aspect ratios: 9:16 vertical (Instagram Stories/TikTok), 16:9 landscape (blogs/websites), and 1:1 square (social media feeds). Export formats include PNG, JPG, and WebP, with resolution up to 4K for professional quality.

items.question: Can I use the generated images commercially?
items.answer: Yes! All images generated with Recipe Step Generator are yours to use commercially. You can use them on your food blog, social media, cookbooks, restaurant menus, and any other commercial purpose without attribution.

items.question: Is there a free tier available?
items.answer: Yes! New users get 2 complete recipe step sets for free with no credit card required. After that, you can choose from our pay-as-you-go credits or monthly/annual subscription plans.

items.question: What cuisines and cooking styles are supported?
items.answer: Recipe Step Generator supports virtually all cuisines and cooking styles worldwide - from Italian pasta to Japanese sushi, American BBQ to Indian curry. The AI has been trained on diverse global cooking techniques and can handle both simple and complex recipes.
